ProductInfo.Engineers: Alex Park, Dana Cruz, Priya Nair, James Okafor

Feature.Name: Export to CSV
Feature.Description: Users may export any current dashboard view to a CSV file. Export captures the full visible dataset including applied filters, date range, and cohort selection. Rate-limited to 10 exports per hour per account. File size cap 50 MB. Download link expires in 24 hours.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: 100k-row export completes in under 90 seconds at P95
Export preserves all applied filters and date range selection
Download link is secure and expires after 24 hours
Rate limit error message is clear and actionable

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-001 Kate Ellison: critical feature, unblocked weekly reporting workflow

Feature.Name: Custom date range filter
Feature.Description: Users may select any custom date range for dashboard views rather than being limited to preset windows (last 7, 30, 90 days). Calendar picker UI with comparison period option. Saved date ranges persist per user.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Date picker renders correctly on all supported browsers
Saved ranges persist across sessions
Comparison period overlay is optional and dismissible

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-003 Priya Shankar: enables quarter-over-quarter analysis without manual workaround

Feature.Name: User-level drill-down
Feature.Description: From any cohort view, users can drill down to see individual user activity. Shows event timeline, session frequency, and retention stage for a selected user. Obfuscated by default, with opt-in disclosure per enterprise account settings.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Drill-down from cohort table renders in under 2 seconds at P95
Default obfuscation applied unless enterprise account explicitly opts in
User lookup returns results within 500ms

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-002 Marcus Webb: unlocked investigation of the high-retention cohort we could not explain before

Feature.Name: Shared dashboard links
Feature.Description: Users can generate a shareable link to any dashboard view. Links preserve filters, date range, and cohort selection. Links can be scoped to view-only or full-account access. Link expiry is configurable (24h, 7d, 30d, permanent).

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Shared link renders the exact view state it was created from
Access control enforced on link type selection
Permanent links can be revoked by the creating user

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-001: weekly reporting workflow now fully in-product instead of screenshot email chains

Feature.Name: Funnel visualization
Feature.Description: Users can build conversion funnels from any sequence of product events. Funnel displays step-by-step conversion rates, drop-off points, and median time between steps. Up to 8 steps per funnel. Funnels can be saved and shared.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Funnel renders in under 3 seconds for datasets with up to 500k events
Drop-off percentages are mathematically accurate to 2 decimal places
Median time between steps is calculated correctly

Feature.PilotFeedback: All three pilot accounts named funnel visualization in NPS comments as a top-3 feature

Feature.Name: Email digest reports
Feature.Description: Users can schedule automated email digests with key dashboard metrics. Configurable frequency (daily, weekly, monthly). Digest includes sparkline charts, key metric delta, and a direct link to the dashboard. Supports up to 5 recipients per digest.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Emails deliver within 5 minutes of scheduled time at P95
Sparkline charts render correctly in Gmail and Outlook
Unsubscribe link functional within 2 clicks
No duplicate sends on retry

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-001: allows sharing insights with non-platform stakeholders

Feature.Name: Messaging alert integration
Feature.Description: Users can configure threshold-based alerts that post to a team messaging channel when a key metric crosses a defined threshold. Supports absolute and percentage-change triggers. Alert payload includes metric name, current value, threshold, and dashboard link.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Alert fires within 5 minutes of threshold crossing at P95
No duplicate alerts within a 10-minute window for the same threshold
Webhook isolated in a separate microservice to protect main analytics service

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-002: real-time alerting replaces manual daily dashboard checks for on-call team

Feature.Name: Cohort comparison table
Feature.Description: Users can place two or more user cohorts side-by-side in a comparison table. Any dimension can be used as the comparison axis: time period, segment, feature adoption, plan type. Export to CSV supported.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: Table renders up to 10 cohorts simultaneously without performance degradation
Columns are sortable and filterable
Export matches the visible table state exactly

Feature.PilotFeedback: ENT-PC-003 Priya Shankar: gave this feature 5 stars. Cited it as the reason for 10 NPS score.

Feature.Name: Benchmark overlay
Feature.Description: Show a customer their own metrics alongside an anonymized peer cohort benchmark. Requires cross-account aggregation pipeline. Privacy-first design: no account is identifiable in the benchmark.
Feature.PilotDemand: Medium - 2 of 3 pilots expressed interest; ENT-PC-003 highest interest

Feature.Name: Enterprise API access
Feature.Description: Programmatic API to query the analytics dashboard for data teams. REST endpoints for key metrics. API key authentication with scoped permissions. Rate-limited. Security review in progress.
Feature.PilotDemand: High - all 3 pilots requested. ENT-PC-002 put this as the number 1 future feature.
Feature.BlockedBy: Security team review - 4-week backlog, review requested November 10, 2026

Feature.Name: Annotation layer
Feature.Description: Allow users to add annotations directly on charts (e.g., mark a deployment date, a marketing campaign, a policy change). Annotations are scoped to the dashboard or shared with the team.
Feature.PilotDemand: Low - 1 of 3 pilots mentioned it; no strong demand signal

Feature.Name: White-label branding
Feature.Description: Enterprise accounts can apply their own logo, color palette, and subdomain to the dashboard surface. Primarily an upsell feature for accounts that embed the dashboard in their own products.
Feature.PilotDemand: Medium - ENT-PC-003 expressed strong interest for internal reporting portal

Sprint.Notes: Two points rolled for UI polish. All three features verified by pilot accounts within 5 days of ship.
Performance issue on large cohort in NS-F006 caught in sprint review. James Okafor resolved on weekend before end-of-sprint demo.
2 points UI polish on alert config UI deferred to hypercare. Messaging webhook isolated per Megan Shaw decision. All three pilot accounts signed off by November 8.
